station_address: Sion - Trombay Rd, near Fire Brigade, शिवसाई को हा सोसायटी, Sindhi Society, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400071
text:
Bharat petroleum pump next to K star mall on the highway good place for fueling your vehicle you will get premium quality and PUC check is also available best part is they inform customers 2 day advance if you PUC is getting expired it helps in city like Mumbai

Thanks !!

station_address: Sion - Trombay Rd, near Fire Brigade, शिवसाई को हा सोसायटी, Sindhi Society, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400071
text: If you have BS6 vehicle don't try to make PUC here cause most of the time it fails and after failing they said that I have to give the 50rs for it even though it has failed. The guy working there said it's some technical problem come tomorrow I will make it for free then. I went tomorrow then he told me that I have to pay again 50rs. I told him that you just said yesterday it will be for free. He was like the manager takes the money and its policy to take money every time even though it gets failed or not. The manager attitude is also aggressive. Don't visit this petrol pump
